# tfe_team_token

This ephemeral resource can be used to retrieve a team token without saving its value in state.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `team_id` (String) ID of the team.

### Optional

- `expired_at` (String) The token's expiration date.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) System generated ID of the team token.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated token.
